column1: # Task #141 CPU-vs-GPU one-shot crossover. CPU full-mode zenbench wall (7950X, no target-cpu=native).
#          + gpu_coldstart_2026-05-29.tsv (cuda, cold_total_ms + warm_per_call_ms) + gpu_metrics_sweep_2026-05-28.tsv (cuda full warm).
# gpu_cold_total_ms = context-init + metric_new + first_compute (the one-shot GPU floor). Only measured at 512/1024/2048/4096.
# one_shot_winner: CPU if cpu_full_ms < gpu_cold_total_ms else GPU.   batch_winner: CPU if cpu_full_ms < gpu_warm_ms else GPU.
